name: ToDit
tagline: A tool that records tasks as footprints rather than just checking them off
description: Beyond a simple checklist — a task management service that logs what, why, and how you accomplished things. Finished tasks never vanish.

name: inPaser
tagline: A tool that doesn't just read information, but decomposes it into structures
description: An input processing service that parses and classifies long texts and documents into core units using AI. A reading assistant layer for the information overload era.

name: ON-Alim
tagline: Only the notifications you need, at the exact right timing
description: A notification integration service that receives and filters scattered notices and schedules in one place. AI·SW Maestro 17th team project.

name: Dankook Racing
tagline: Real-time visualization of racing car telemetry data
description: A monitoring system that collects and dashboards vehicle sensor telemetry data for the Dankook Racing Team. An interface between hardware and software.
